sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94327" key="sitapodoxei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῑτ-αποδοχεῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n94327.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">granary</tr_>, Partsch <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Sandschak Berat</tr_> <bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,P.Lips.:200" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">200</biblScope> </bibl> (Epirus, <date TEIform="date">ii A.D.</date>).</sense> </entryFree>
